title: Westrr's Reinforcements
description: A mod that adds a Reinforced Bone Amor set with a Reinforced Bone Blade. Easy to make and worth a try.
body:
Ever wanted an easy-to-get armor set, but also it being good (unlike leather)? This is the mod for you.

With easy crafting recepies and special effects with a full armor set I present to you the **Reinforced Bone**, **Armor**, **Block** & **Blade**.
